summary: A symmetrical ranch-style building with a prominent central chimney, gable roof with stepped pyramid peak, horizontal striped walls alternating wood and stone, two tall decorative chimneys flanking the structure, and a white fence perimeter. The building features a low-profile design with horizontal emphasis and sits on a dirt foundation.

shape.overall_form: rectangular with central gable roof and flanking chimneys

rebuild_hints: Build rectangular base 14 blocks wide, 10 blocks deep
Construct walls with alternating horizontal stripes of wood and stone materials
Create central gable roof with stepped pyramid peak reaching approximately 12 blocks height
Place two tall decorative chimneys (approximately 8-9 blocks) on left and right sides
Add central chimney structure integrated with roof peak
Surround perimeter with white fence blocks, spaced evenly
Apply dirt/coarse dirt to ground foundation area
Ensure bilateral symmetry along the central longitudinal axis
Use slab_stone or similar for roof striping details visible in images
uncertainties: Exact interior layout not visible from exterior views
Precise block count for roof peak construction uncertain due to perspective
Whether chimneys are functional or decorative unclear
Exact material composition of striped walls (may include additional variants like dark oak, spruce, or different stone types)
Presence of windows or doors not clearly visible in provided angles
Exact fence post spacing and configuration
